next_step.observation: Reading explicit list item 5 returned file not found.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks to review next inbound note and act. Inbox note requests OCR of exactly 5 explicit file paths. I read the inbox item and attempted to read all 5 listed paths; 4 succeeded, the 5th path does not exist. I re-searched once and found that underscore path only appears in the inbox note itself. Completeness rule forbids partial processing when one explicitly listed file is missing. No mutations were made.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Request corrected path or file creation
Await clarification before any OCR writes
next_step.observation: A confirmatory search found the missing underscore filename only inside the inbox request, not as an actual finance file.

function.message: I reviewed the next inbox note and validated its explicit OCR file list. Four listed purchase files exist, but the fifth listed path is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_05__eur_000033__bill__studio_parts_nozzle_and_inserts.md` (leading underscore). I cannot complete the request exactly as written without that file path being corrected or the file being added.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied explicit-file-list precedence from inbox instructions and non-partial completion rule for missing required data; avoided mutations when task could not be completed exactly.
function.outcome_justification: The authoritative inbox request (00_inbox/724_next-task.md) specifies 5 exact file paths. Read attempts succeeded for items 1-4 but failed for item 5 (file not found). A follow-up search found that filename only in the inbox note, confirming the source file is absent. Completing only 4/5 would violate completeness requirements, so clarification is required.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of listed file 5 (not found)
